title: helichroa
intro: Helichroa is a genus of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids, terpenoids, and other secondary metabolites, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Helichroa has been used to treat fever, cold, and respiratory issues, as well as to alleviate pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tea, or tincture, and is also sometimes used in traditional herbal remedies to boost the immune system and improve overall well-being.
